rationale: No qualitative new events directly affecting Poland; Iran deal uncertainty continues to influence energy price outlook indirectly.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: conflicting signals on Sunday signing
top_events.summary: Trump claims a deal will be signed Sunday but Tehran disputes the timeline, keeping energy markets uncertain. Lower gas prices remain possible but unconfirmed, indirectly affecting Polish energy costs.

top_events.title: UK seizes suspected Russian shadow fleet tanker in English Channel
top_events.summary: British forces intercepted a vessel linked to Russia's shadow fleet, signaling tighter enforcement of sanctions. This is a modest positive for Poland as it supports pressure on Russia's oil revenues.

top_events.title: Russian families use AI to 'resurrect' war dead
top_events.summary: A human-interest story about Russian grief over Ukraine war losses — no direct policy or security impact on Poland. Background noise on the ongoing war.
